code:
import io
import string

fn main() -> Result<Unit, String>
  let line_opt = io.read_line()
  let line = match line_opt
  when Some(l)
    l
  when None
    ""
  end
  let tokens = string.split_whitespace(line)
  mut sum = 0
  mut i = 0
  while i < tokens.len()
    let tok_opt = tokens.get(i)
    let tok = match tok_opt
    when Some(t)
      t
    when None
      ""
    end
    let n_opt = string.parse_int(tok)
    match n_opt
    when Some(n)
      if n > 0
        sum = sum + n * 2
      end
    when None
      sum = sum
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  print("result=#{sum}")
  Ok(())
end
